commands.review_summary:
The PR tints inline usage dashboard mini bars with provider branding colors, adds focused Swift Testing coverage, and notes the fix in CHANGELOG.md.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows MiniUsageBars chooses color from valueStyle rather than provider branding, so same-style providers cannot get distinct inline bar colors on main.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers should wait for required CI and then decide whether to merge the visual consistency change.

target.title: Fix/chart bars provider color
target.body:
## Summary

- Tint inline overview history bars with each provider's branding color.
- Resolve the color once on the dashboard model, matching detailed cost-history charts and provider switcher indicators.
- Preserve the existing value-type palette as a fallback for direct models without a provider color.

## Proof

- `swift test --filter InlineUsageDashboardBarColorTests`: 2 tests passed; all registered providers match descriptor branding, and resolved Codex/Claude dashboards carry distinct colors.
- `swift test --filter InlineCostHistoryDashboardLabelTests`: 2 tests passed.
- `make check`: passed; SwiftLint found 0 violations in 1,145 files.
- Full branch `autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main --stream-engine-output`: clean, confidence 0.88.
- `git diff --check`: passed.

## Visual review

- Contributor after screenshot shows distinct Codex teal and Claude terracotta bars with correct alignment and no clipping.
- Exact-head local debug app built and launched.
- Exact-head recapture was blocked by a macOS App Data consent sheet before menu interaction. Peekaboo had Screen Recording but not Accessibility, and Computer Use timed out; no privacy permission was granted and no exact-head screenshot is claimed.

## CI

The prior run was cancelled while macOS jobs were active; Linux x64/arm64 and security had passed. This rebased head starts a fresh run.

## Review

- Rebased onto current `main`.
- Added contributor changelog credit.
target.author: elijahfriedman
